/usr/bin/ar qc libdram.a CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pimkernel/pim_kernel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pimkernel/Read.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pimkernel/Write.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pimkernel/GEMV.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/dram_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/dram_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/pim_request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/memory_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dram.dir/mmap_controller.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libdram.a
